items.name: Chic Paddington White Leather Gold Lock Bag
items.description:
ALL COLORS:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=11&Subcategory=24&CreatorName=Pryse&salesTypeFilter=1

It was on a rainy Tuesday in a Paris Internet café when Chloe stumbled upon it—a vintage gem tucked away on Vestiaire Collective, calling her name like a long-lost friend. With its effortlessly slouchy silhouette and buttery pristine leather, the bag had that lived-in luxury only time could craft.

A bold gold padlock anchored the front, gleaming softly like a secret waiting to be told. Not just an accessory, but a statement—equal parts relaxed and refined. The bag’s weight felt reassuring on her arm, like carrying a little piece of history with every step.

Soft, structured, and unapologetically niche—this piece isn’t just worn. It’s lived in.

items.name: Marble Butterfly Shoulder Companion [PBR]
items.description:
🦋 “Not just an accessory — it’s a living piece of art.” ✨
Perched upon your shoulder, this marble-winged butterfly isn’t ordinary. Its cracked crystal-like wings glisten with soft light, while golden chains sway gently with every step you take. Wearing it feels less like fashion and more like carrying a fragment of a magical tale on your shoulder. Perfect for avatars who want to be remembered, not just noticed.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
One-of-a-kind marble wings that shimmer like enchanted stone
Golden chain ornaments that dance with your movement
A shoulder companion that turns heads in fantasy and fashion worlds
Crafted with PBR textures for striking realism and artistic flair
🔍 Keywords: butterfly, marble, magical, shoulder, fantasy, enchanted, elegant, stylish, wings, unique
✨ Don’t just accessorize — make your avatar a legend.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
